creator: b.shertenlieb@yahoo.com
text:
(In reply to Vladimir Druzenko from comment #6)

I took these ports over; everything was already written by the previous maintainer(s), and if not mistaken one was also a committer here at the time... Probably why it's been here for so long without the license being defined and other things that were not exactly proper...

I was lucky enough to figure out what changes needed to be made to the Makefile to update the ports and how to submit the bug reports here to get it done and keep the ports available... I have looked at the Porter's Handbook and most all of it is over my head...

The last serious programming I did was in Apple Basic on and old Apple IIe back in the 80's!!! lol...

If these new Makefiles you have written work correctly, do exactly what they did before, and pass all the QA requirements, great!!! I certainly appreciate your time in putting them together... Please feel free to commit them, but I am not able to follow or understand the changes made...
